patch.value: pm extension --install pm-<alias> / @unbrained/pm-<alias> fails with 'Local extension source does not exist' instead of suggesting the bundled catalog alias

2026-07-04 sandbox audit #3: 'pm extension install pm-beads' falls through to local-path resolution and errors 'Local extension source does not exist: .../pm-beads'. The bundled catalog alias is 'beads' (install_command 'pm install beads --project'). Agents naturally try the package folder name (pm-beads) or npm name (@unbrained/pm-beads). Fix: before local-path fallback, match the target against bundled catalog aliases, package folder names (pm-<alias>) and npm package names (@unbrained/pm-<alias>); on near-miss emit a did-you-mean with the exact install command.
pm extension --install pm-<alias> and @unbrained/pm-<alias> resolve to the bundled catalog or fail with a suggestion listing catalog aliases; never-block recovery bundle included.

## Context
2026-07-04 sandbox audit #3: `pm extension install pm-beads` (also @unbrained/pm-beads) falls through to local-path resolution and errors 'Local extension source does not exist: .../pm-beads'. The bundled catalog alias is 'beads' (install_command `pm install beads --project`). Agents naturally try the package folder name or npm name first — never-block demands a mapping, not a dead end.

## Approach
Before the local-path fallback in the extension install resolver, match the target against: bundled catalog aliases, package folder names (pm-<alias>), and npm names (@unbrained/pm-<alias>). Exact match → install the catalog alias directly (or emit the exact install command); near-miss → did-you-mean via the existing OSA Damerau suggester.

## Definition of done
All three spellings of every bundled package either install or emit the exact catalog command; unknown names still reach the local-path error; spec covers alias, folder-name, npm-name, and near-miss paths.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-06 audit #12: reproduced live on v2026.7.6 tarball in CJS sandbox (root 'pm install pm-kanban' same dead-end). Fixed: resolveBundledPackageRoot now matches alias + package directory (pm-<alias>) + npm package name (@unbrained/pm-<alias>), case-insensitive; local-path miss on bare package-ish names now raises code local_source_not_found_bare_name with npm:<name> next_best_command and the bundled alias list. Specs added to extension-command.spec.ts (spellings + bare-name recovery + path-miss stays plain).

patch.value: Bundled-source resolution accepts alias/pm-<alias>/@unbrained/pm-<alias>; unmatched bare names emit npm:-prefixed next_best_command plus bundled alias catalog in a never-block recovery bundle.
All three spellings of every bundled package install or emit the exact catalog command; unknown names still reach the local-path error with targeted recovery.

Verified end-to-end on fresh temp workspace: pm install pm-kanban + @unbrained/pm-todos install; pm install pm-changelog (npm-only) errors with npm:pm-changelog hint; 116/116 spec tests pass; tsc clean.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Fixed in audit #12 working tree: bundled alias spellings + never-block bare-name recovery (extension/bundled-catalog.ts, extension/install-sources.ts).

value.author: codex-cli-agent
value.text: Review response: accepted Greptile P2 on bare-name recovery wording. The bundled-alias hint no longer renders misleading 'Known aliases: .' punctuation when no aliases are discovered; focused extension/register/annotation tests pass.

value.author: codex-cli-agent
value.text: Review response: accepted Sourcery feedback on bundled alias discovery cost. Bare local-source miss recovery now caches bundled package aliases after the first lookup, avoiding repeated filesystem/catalog work across multi-target install failures while preserving best-effort fallback behavior. Verification: focused register/extension tests passed (197 tests); pnpm typecheck passed.

value.author: codex-cli-agent
value.text: Review response: accepted Greptile P2 on the bundled-alias cache lifetime. The cache is now keyed by the resolved PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT override, so test/runtime package-root changes refresh alias discovery while repeated misses in one scope still avoid duplicate filesystem scans. Verification: focused register/extension tests passed (197 tests); pnpm typecheck passed.
